name: AI Legal Intake — Voice AI to Google Workspace

nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Call Data
nodes.notes: Receives structured call data from Bland.ai (or any Voice AI provider). Authenticated via shared secret header.

nodes.name: Validate Payload
nodes.notes: Validates required fields and normalizes data (phone format, trimming, defaults).

nodes.name: Read Dedup Tracker
nodes.notes: Reads the Dedup Tracker sheet to check for duplicate call_ids or recent phone matches.

nodes.name: Check for Duplicates
nodes.notes: Two-layer dedup: 1) Exact call_id match, 2) Same phone within 24hr window.

nodes.name: New Lead?
nodes.notes: Routes new leads to processing, duplicates to the update/skip path.

nodes.name: Log Duplicate to Lead Log
nodes.notes: Logs duplicate calls for audit trail.

nodes.name: Qualification Engine
nodes.notes: Two-layer qualification: deterministic rules for clear-cut cases, AI for gray areas. Defaults to qualified.

nodes.name: Sheets: Add Qualified Lead
nodes.notes: Adds qualified lead to the Leads (CRM) sheet.

nodes.name: Sheets: Add Not-Qualified Lead
nodes.notes: Adds not-qualified lead to the Leads sheet (still tracked).

nodes.name: Gmail: URGENT Lead Alert

parameters.subject: URGENT NEW LEAD: {{ $json.caller_name }} — {{ $json.case_type.replace(/_/g, ' ') }}
parameters.message:
URGENT New Qualified Lead

Name:{{ $json.caller_name }}
Phone:{{ $json.phone }}
Email:{{ $json.email || 'Not provided' }}
Case Type:{{ $json.case_type.replace(/_/g, ' ') }}
Urgency:HIGH
Description:{{ $json.case_description }}
Qualification:{{ $json.qualification_reason }}

AI Intake | Call ID: {{ $json.call_id }}

nodes.notes: Urgent qualified leads get an immediate high-priority email to the urgent intake list.

nodes.name: Gmail: New Lead Alert

parameters.subject: New Qualified Lead: {{ $json.caller_name }} — {{ $json.case_type.replace(/_/g, ' ') }}
parameters.message:
New Qualified Lead

Name:{{ $json.caller_name }}
Phone:{{ $json.phone }}
Email:{{ $json.email || 'Not provided' }}
Case Type:{{ $json.case_type.replace(/_/g, ' ') }}
Urgency:{{ $json.urgency }}
Description:{{ $json.case_description }}
Qualification:{{ $json.qualification_reason }}

AI Intake | Call ID: {{ $json.call_id }}

nodes.notes: Standard qualified leads get a notification email to the intake team.

nodes.name: Gmail: Decline Email to Lead

parameters.subject: Thank you for contacting [Firm Name]
parameters.message:
Dear {{ $json.caller_name.split(' ')[0] }},

Thank you for reaching out to [Firm Name]. We appreciate you taking the time to contact us about your legal matter.

After reviewing the details of your inquiry, we've determined that your matter falls outside our firm's current practice areas. We want to make sure you get the right help.

We recommend contacting the California State Bar Lawyer Referral Service at 1-866-442-2529. They can connect you with an attorney who specializes in your type of case.

We wish you the very best.

Warm regards,
[Firm Name]

nodes.notes: Polite decline email with State Bar referral. Only sends if the lead provided an email.

nodes.name: Gmail: FYI to Intake Team

parameters.subject: Non-Qualified Lead: {{ $json.caller_name }} — {{ $json.case_type.replace(/_/g, ' ') }}
parameters.message:
Non-Qualified Lead (FYI)

Name: {{ $json.caller_name }} | Phone: {{ $json.phone }} | Case: {{ $json.case_type.replace(/_/g, ' ') }}

Reason: {{ $json.qualification_reason }}

Decline email {{ $json.email ? 'sent' : 'NOT sent (no email on file)' }}.

Call ID: {{ $json.call_id }}

nodes.notes: Informational notification so intake team knows the lead was handled.

nodes.name: Calendar: Follow-Up Event
nodes.notes: Creates a follow-up calendar event. Urgent = 30 min, standard = 1 hour.

nodes.name: Sheets: Log to Lead Log
nodes.notes: Full audit trail for every processed lead.

nodes.name: Sheets: Update Dedup Tracker
nodes.notes: Records the call for future duplicate detection.

nodes.name: Sheets: Log Error
nodes.notes: Logs failed executions to Error Log sheet for review.

nodes.name: Gmail: Alert Admin

parameters.subject: [ALERT] Intake Automation Error
parameters.message:
Intake Automation Error

Error: {{ $json.error?.message }}

Node: {{ $json.error?.node }}

Time: {{ new Date().toISOString() }}

Check the Error Log sheet for details.

nodes.notes: Alerts admin when workflow fails after retries.
